consistency_rationale: M_tau_eff (7.511e+10 M_sun) <= López Fune upper envelope 7.900e+10 M_sun (M_enclosed_23kpc + 1.0σ uncertainty).
circularity_note: López Fune et al. 2017 uses Corbelli et al. 2014 baryonic/rotation inputs; partial circularity with this TDF branch. Dynamics/rotation-based reference only.
